expectations.text: Produces specific A/B test ideas because the flow was described (does not refuse for lack of an asset)
expectations.evidence: Delivers five concrete tests; does not invoke the audit/asset gate since the flow was described.

expectations.text: Provides at least 3 distinct test hypotheses
Each hypothesis ties to a plausible reason for drop-off on the payment/shipping step
expectations.evidence: Each has a 'Why' grounded in form length, surprise cost, payment anxiety, or forced account creation.

expectations.text: Names the primary metric to evaluate the test
expectations.evidence: Each test names a metric (middle-step/checkout-completion rate, etc.).

expectations.text: Includes at least one caution about test validity, sample size, or not chasing a vanity metric
expectations.evidence: 'Run them right' covers single-variable, sample size, significance, and vanity-metric warning.
